pains.heading: If you've already tried making bags… but they didn't turn out the way you hoped, you're not the only one.

items.desc: The finishes come out amateur no matter how hard you try.

items.title: You don't know which materials to use

items.title: The weave isn't firm
items.desc: Your bag warps, loses its shape or the thread slips out.

items.title: You don't know what to charge
items.desc: You give your work away or scare clients off with the price.

items.title: You waste time trying without guidance

pains.closing: The difference isn't talent. It's the right technique.

mentor.name: Maca Perez
mentor.p1: For more than 5 years I've guided women from different countries to learn clear techniques for creating bags in beads and plastic canvas with elegant finishes and a boutique style.
mentor.p2: My methodology is designed so you can learn step by step, craft sophisticated pieces and turn your creativity into a collection with its own identity.

community.heading: A private community where students share progress and land their first clients
community.subtitle: You'll be part of a private community where women from all over the world share their creations, support each other and grow together crafting bags with a boutique style.
perks: Get your questions answered with direct support.
Share your progress and get feedback from other students.
Get inspired with new designs every week.
Connect with women who are also building a business.

guarantee.heading: 7-day full guarantee with Hotmart
guarantee.body: Access the program, review every module, explore all the resources and see for yourself if it's what you were looking for. If the program doesn't exceed your expectations, Hotmart refunds 100% of your investment, no questions asked.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you start.

items.q: Is the course live or already recorded?
items.a: The course is 100% recorded in step-by-step videos, so you learn at your own pace, with no schedules and as many times as you want.

items.q: Do I need to know how to weave or have experience?
items.a: No. The course is designed from scratch, even if you've never made a bag before.

items.q: Does it include a materials list?
items.a: Yes. Every tutorial lists the materials needed, plus a directory of affordable suppliers to find everything easily.

items.q: Will I be able to sell the bags I make?
items.a: Yes. You can create your own collection and sell your bags with boutique-style finishes.

items.q: Does the course include the molds or patterns?
items.a: Yes. It includes more than 50 exclusive patterns ready to apply to your designs.

items.q: What kind of bags will I learn to make?
items.a: You'll learn beaded (pearl) bags and plastic canvas bags, with elegant finishes and a luxury style.
Access is for life. You can log in whenever you want and repeat the lessons as many times as you need.

items.q: Can I watch the course on my phone?
items.a: Yes. You can access it from your phone, tablet or computer at any time.

items.q: Does the course include support or help?
items.a: Yes. You'll have access to our private community where you can get your questions answered and share your progress.

items.q: What language is the course in?
items.a: The videos are in Spanish, but many are visual and step-by-step, so they're easy to follow even without listening.

items.q: How long until I see results?
items.a: From the very first lessons you'll be able to create your first bags. Many students start selling within a few weeks.

items.q: Is this course only for a hobby or also for business?
items.a: It's for both. You can do it as a hobby or turn it into a source of income from home.

items.q: What exactly does the course include?
items.a: It includes: ✦ Beaded bags course ✦ Plastic canvas bags course ✦ 50 exclusive patterns ✦ Supplier directory ✦ Costs and pricing template ✦ Digital marketing manual ✦ Private community.

items.q: How do I receive access after paying?
items.a: You'll receive instant access in your email to log in to the platform.

items.q: Is this a course or do you sell the physical bags?
items.a: This is a digital course. You'll learn to create your own bags step by step.

items.q: Do I need to buy materials before starting?
items.a: You don't need materials to start. First you access the course, explore the designs and choose which bag you want to create. That way you buy only what you need and avoid spending money on materials you won't use.
